title: Forward Industries moves $32M in SOL amid $1B paper loss
summary: Forward Industries moved $31.9 million in SOL to Coinbase Prime as its Solana bet sits over 70% underwater, underscoring growing strain on corporate crypto treasuries.

title: South Korea police probe Polymarket users over illegal gambling claims: Report
summary: South Korean police reportedly launched the country’s first illegal gambling probe into local Polymarket users amid election-betting scrutiny.

title: India Growth Beats Estimates on Strong Domestic Demand
summary: India’s economy grew faster than expected in the three months through March, on sustained private and government spending before higher energy costs began weighing on the outlook.

title: Fuel Shocks, Rising Prices Imperil India Consumption Growth
summary: The global energy crisis is threatening to slow spending among India’s vast middle class, undermining a fragile recovery in consumption and adding to the woes of an economy already grappling with a markets and currency slump.

title: Pump.fun's Latest Experiment Is Already Getting Weird
summary: Pump.fun's GO bounty platform already has hundreds of listings following its pitch to let users “Pay ANYONE to do ANYTHING.”

title: ZEC Crashes 38% as Zcash Discloses ‘Critical Counterfeiting Vulnerability’
summary: An Orchard vulnerability that allowed undetectable counterfeiting of ZEC in its shielded pool has reignited debate over privacy coins.

title: CME CEO Duffy says new perpetual futures could be ‘disaster waiting to happen’
summary: CME CEO Terry Duffy warned that U.S.-approved perpetual futures risk retail blowouts and excessive leverage exposure.

title: Zcash selloff extends past 50% amid bug disclosure as liquidations top $100 million
summary: ZEC crashed over 50% to around $310 amid Zcash's Orchard bug disclosure and more than $116 million in 24-hour liquidations.

title: Musk’s SpaceX lines up retail investors for record IPO allocation
summary: Up to a quarter of the rocket builder’s $75bn float will be set aside for individual investors
